PROOF OF SERVICE RE MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS AND MEMORANDUM OF COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS CONTINUED TO JULY 31, 2014 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JULY 23, 2014 AT 4:00 P.M. OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR# 5976. (302)

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Jul-31-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC's MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS is Granted without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Judgment shall be entered in favor of plaintiff for $5,295.61. Costs to be determined by a costs memorandum. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: John Stewart; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 =(302/JKS)

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Jul-23-2014 Continued To Jul-31-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS is continued to July 31, 2014 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than July 23, 2014 at 4:00 p.m. or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.
